hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = $data.tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -match 'docs') { @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'PostToolUse'; additionalContext = ('New file added to docs: ' + $fp + '. Please update the nearest CLAUDE.md to reference this file — add it under a ## Docs section with a one-line description of its content.') } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }
